{{Expand}}

{{Infobox territory
| name = Incarnation of a warrior
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Valin]] has an [[Incarnation of a warrior]] [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Territories]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
